$comment: Ground-truth calibration cases for the dual-framework verdict (Adam's idea lens + Qiao's founder lens). Used by the calibration test runner to compute match rate. Each case carries explicit provenance: 'verbatim' = judge publicly classified the project; 'framework_applied' = ground-truth label is derived by applying the judge's documented public framework to a publicly-known project. Verbatim cases are gold — framework_applied are the wider sample for reliability claims.

adam.summary: Greenfield = experimental rigor + falsifiable hypotheses. Iterative = organic users + real feedback loops + category-specific PMF + no airdrop-farmer dependency.

qiao.summary: Force of will signal: contrarian thinking, willingness-to-be-wrong, lean-and-honest mode of work, AI-tool productivity step-function. Defaults to 'unclear' when no founder context in the input.

cases.idea_input: ride.markets — conviction markets for onchain prediction on long-tail outcomes. New asset class; no direct precedent.
cases.verbatim_reply: Personally id say this is pretty greenfield!

cases.idea_input: KLOUT — stock market for creators. Targets a specific user segment (creators) with an existing analog (creator economy / fan tokens).
cases.verbatim_reply: A quick glance at your bio makes me think you’re more on the iterative side. The good news is that you target a specific user 'creators'. You just need to go to where those potential users hang out online and test your value prop.

cases.idea_input: epicentral_ — onchain options protocol. Existing offchain analog; need organic users + liquidity feedback loop, watch out for airdrop farmers.
cases.verbatim_reply: Good q. The reality is this is a spectrum... onchain options are kind of in the middle. Ultimately you need a good amount of organic users to give you a feedback loop and liquidity... lookout for airdrop farmers.
cases.notes: Adam called it 'spectrum, leaning iterative' — we encode iterative as the dominant signal.

cases.idea_input: We're building a Solana AMM with concentrated liquidity tooling for LPs. Direct competitors: Orca, Raydium, Meteora. Our wedge: better default ranges + UX for passive LPs.
cases.rationale: Crowded category with established analogs (Orca/Raydium/Meteora). Adam's framework: needs organic LP users + measurable PMF on TVL/volume retention vs incumbents. Iterative.

cases.idea_input: Using ZK proofs over email DKIM signatures to prove identity attributes (e.g. 'I have a stripe.com account') onchain without revealing the email. New primitive.
cases.rationale: No direct analog in production at scale. New cryptographic primitive — Adam would expect experimental rigor, falsifiable claims about adoption surface, and willingness to be wrong about the primary use case.

cases.project: Solana perp DEX with social leaderboards
cases.idea_input: Perp DEX on Solana with social copy-trading + leaderboards. Competitors: Drift, Jupiter Perps, Hyperliquid (cross-chain).
cases.rationale: Mature category; iteration on UX + social hooks. Framework demands organic-user evidence and watch for airdrop-farmer skew.

cases.project: Solo founder, lean iteration, ships weekly
cases.idea_input: I'm a solo founder shipping a Solana fee-rebate router. I'm coding 60h/week, used Claude/Cursor to ship the v0 in 11 days, deployed on devnet, recruiting 3 design partners now. Previous startup: bootstrapped a B2B SaaS to $400k ARR, sold last year.
cases.rationale: Qiao's lens: AI-tooling productivity step-function (Claude/Cursor → 11d MVP), prior shipped outcomes (sold a SaaS), lean-and-honest mode (3 design partners). High force-of-will signal.

cases.project: Team building a stablecoin RWA platform — no founder context in input
cases.idea_input: We're building a tokenized money-market fund on Solana with daily NAV reporting. Targeting institutional allocators in EMEA. Compliance-first.
cases.rationale: No founder context in the input — Qiao's lens defaults to 'unclear' (does NOT infer posture from idea polish). Idea itself is iterative (existing money-market analogs).

cases.project: Ex-FAANG team, idea polish but no shipping signal
cases.idea_input: Three engineers from a top quant fund building a perpetual options market. Architectured the protocol. Whitepaper drafted. Still raising before any deployment.
cases.rationale: Founder context exists (credentialed team) but no shipping/contrarian signal yet. Qiao's lens reads 'moderate' until evidence of will-to-ship beats prestige posture.

cases.project: Founder publicly soliciting Colosseum feedback every week
cases.idea_input: Hi judges — building a Solana-native invoicing tool for freelancers. Posted weekly progress updates on X for 6 weeks, 12 design partners onboard, public roadmap. Looking for harsh feedback.
cases.rationale: Billy's overall_style: bullish on founders who seek feedback aggressively. Public progress updates + 12 design partners = the exact signal he praises (e.g. @muse_jp_sol). Iterative idea (existing invoicing analogs); high posture (active feedback loop, willing to be wrong publicly).

usage: Loaded by future `bb calibration-test` runner (V1.5 backlog). Each case is fed to gecko in stub mode; emitted classification + founder_posture compared to expected_*. Match rate is the calibration headline number.
